parameters.query:
INSERT INTO contacts (tenant_id, first_name, last_name, email, type, referral_source, last_interaction)
VALUES (1, '{{ $('Parse Booking Data').item.json.first_name }}', '{{ $('Parse Booking Data').item.json.last_name }}', '{{ $('Parse Booking Data').item.json.email }}', 'paying_client', 'booking', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, email) DO UPDATE SET
  type = 'paying_client',
  last_interaction = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, first_name, last_name, email, type

INSERT INTO interactions (tenant_id, contact_id, direction, channel, subject, body, workflow_id)
VALUES (1, {{ $('Upsert Contact').item.json.id }}, 'inbound', 'webhook', 'Booking Confirmation', 'Booking webhook received from confirm-booking.ts — booking ID {{ $('Parse Booking Data').item.json.booking_id }}', 'WF_BOOKING')
